name: Sunk Cost Fallacy — Continued Investment
description: People continue investing in a losing course of action because of previously invested resources (time, money, effort), even when rational analysis says to stop.

stimulus.description: Data shows the project has 15% chance of success. A new alternative approach would cost 100K and has 70% chance. But switching means writing off the 500K.

expected.behavior: argues to continue the current project, finds reasons to doubt the alternative

sources: Arkes & Blumer 1985 — The Psychology of Sunk Cost
